expect: SPACES GET CREATED — one per leg (Cairo, the safari/Ngorongoro leg, Zanzibar, Dar es Salaam), each with its own agent, not one generic space
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

errors.message: Cannot find name 'console'. Do you need to change your target library? Try changing the 'lib' compiler option to include 'dom'.

costs.notes: Round-trip via Cairo, booked as one ticket.

costs.item: Suricata Safaris 13-day Northern Circuit package (2 pax)
costs.notes: Deposit paid, balance due before departure. Covers all park fees, accommodation, meals on safari, guide, vehicle.
Suricata arranges — included in package or extra? Confirm.
Return leg of the international ticket? Verify.
TBD — not yet booked. Beach resort with dinner.
Crater day — paid ~TZS 35,000 in shillings. Exact in USD uncertain.
Emmanuel mentioned ~TZS 5,000 cash. NOT included in park fees. Ask Richard.

itinerary.description: Depart Athens, arrive Cairo. Cairo stopover en route to Tanzania.
itinerary.notes: Flight from Athens to Cairo, overnight layover.

itinerary.description: Depart Cairo, fly to Kilimanjaro Airport, transfer to Arusha.
itinerary.notes: Evening arrival in Arusha. Suricata Safaris briefing.

itinerary.description: Full day Arusha — city tour, local markets, Cultural Heritage Centre.
itinerary.notes: Rest and preparation day before safari.

itinerary.description: Game drive in Tarangire National Park. Famous for large elephant herds and baobab trees.
Game drive in Lake Manyara National Park. Tree-climbing lions, flamingos, diverse birdlife.
Drive from Manyara to Ngorongoro Conservation Area. Afternoon at the rim.

Full-day crater descent game drive. Dense wildlife — rhinos, lions, hippos, flamingos. Driver: Emmanuel (excellent). Bought two Maasai bracelets for Athina (~TZS 35,000). Ranger tip question (~TZS 5,000 cash) — need to ask Richard.
itinerary.notes: Crater day! Emmanuel was the driver-guide, not Richard from the office. Maasai bracelet purchase: $20–25 for both, paid TZS 35,000. Unresolved: extra ranger tip ~TZS 5,000 cash at gate — ask Richard before safari balance payment.

itinerary.description: Drive from Ngorongoro to central Serengeti. Afternoon game drive in Seronera area.
Full-day game drive in central Serengeti. Big cats, great migration herds, kopjes.
Full-day game drive in central Serengeti.
Drive north to Kogatende / Mara River area. Afternoon game drive — river crossings possible.
Full-day game drive in northern Serengeti. Mara River, migration herds.
Full-day game drive in northern Serengeti.
Morning game drive, then fly from Serengeti (Kogatende airstrip) back to Arusha.
itinerary.notes: Internal flight: Serengeti to Arusha. Suricata handles the flight booking.

itinerary.description: Fly from Arusha to Zanzibar. Transfer to Stone Town hotel. Afternoon exploring.
itinerary.notes: Internal flight: Arusha to Zanzibar. Stone Town UNESCO World Heritage site.

itinerary.description: Full day Stone Town — walking tour, spice market, Forodhani night market, palace museum.
itinerary.notes: Photo: Stone Town courtyard — white walls, arched windows, carved wooden balconies, bright blue sky.

itinerary.description: Transfer to Kiwengwa beach resort. Beach day, relaxation.
itinerary.notes: East coast beach — white sand, turquoise water.

itinerary.description: Depart Zanzibar, fly to Cairo, connect to Athens. Trip ends.

park_fees.description: Ngorongoro Conservation Area entry — crater descent fee
park_fees.notes: Per person per 24h. Non-resident foreign adult rate.
Per vehicle per descent. Usually included in safari package.

park_fees.description: Public campsite per person per night
park_fees.notes: Simba A campsite on the rim. Included in most safari packages.

park_fees.description: Guided walking safari (per person per walk)
park_fees.notes: Optional extra — not included in standard package. Ask Suricata.

park_fees.description: Ngorongoro Conservation Area entry — crater descent

photos.title: Stone Town Courtyard
photos.description: Inner courtyard of a multi-story building with white walls, arched windows, and dark carved wooden balconies stacked along the facade. Bright blue sky overhead, sunlight hitting the ornate balcony railings and open wooden windows. Mediterranean / Middle Eastern architectural feel.

questions.question: Is there an extra ranger tip (~TZS 5,000 cash) expected at Ngorongoro crater gate, separate from park fees? Need to ask Richard before paying the safari balance.
questions.source: Voice memo — crater day debrief (Emmanuel the driver)

questions.question: Is the Serengeti (Kogatende) → Arusha internal flight included in the safari package, or is it an extra cost?
questions.source: Cost spreadsheet — line item marked estimated

questions.question: Stone Town hotel and Kiwengwa beach resort need to be researched and booked.
Confirm whether the Zanzibar → Cairo leg is part of the existing round-trip ticket or a separate booking.
questions.source: Cost spreadsheet — line item marked estimated

questions.question: Purchase comprehensive travel insurance for both travelers before departure.
questions.source: Cost spreadsheet — line item marked estimated

questions.question: Confirm whether Emmanuel or Richard will be the driver-guide for the full safari. Emmanuel was excellent on crater day.
